scripts.test: cd supabase/functions/coffee-api && JWT_SECRET=mock SUPABASE_URL=https://mock.supabase.co SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=mock deno test --allow-env --allow-net --allow-read tests/
scripts.guardrails: python3 scripts/repo_hygiene_check.py && python3 scripts/check_migration_names.py && python3 scripts/check_dashboard_event_delegation.py && python3 scripts/check_main_event_delegation.py && python3 scripts/sync_frontend_version.py --check
scripts.ci-local: npm run guardrails && npm run fmt:check && npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test
scripts.health: npm run ci-local && npm run build && npm run e2e
